_meta.purpose: Narrative tag taxonomy for WNS (NL1-NL7). Mirrors the WMS tag-definitions pattern but scoped to narrative content. Separate file from WMS tag-definitions.JSON per CC5 (sibling system).
_meta.address_tag_prefixes_note: Narrative address prefixes (thread:, arc:, witness:) are FACTS, never LLM-writable. Server populates them after LLM emits content. See §4.2b of WORLD_SYSTEM_WORKING_DOC.md.
_meta.spam_caps_note: emergent_entity is dynamic / free-form. Runtime enforces caps (max 2 per fragment, max 5 per weaving run) so the LLM can't drown the registry in proper-noun spam.

thread_stage.description: Where in its arc a thread fragment sits.

tone.description: Narrative mood of the fragment. Multi-valued allowed (a fragment can be both grim and triumphant).

relationship.description: Inter-actor / faction relationship framed by the fragment. Multi-valued allowed.

narrative_domain.description: What kind of story this fragment contributes to. Multi-valued allowed.

agency.description: Who has the power to act on this thread. Helps WES decide whether new content should be player-encounterable (player/npc) or world-state (faction/world).

emergent_entity.description: Dynamic (free-form) names surfaced by weaving — factions, places, persons the LLM leans on. Spam-capped at runtime: max 2 per fragment, max 5 per weaving run. Designer can later promote frequently-recurring entries to allow-listed categories.
